user_prompt: Analyse this sales data and create a Word report for leadership

source_data_summary.ground_truth: Planted anomaly: South/Product_B March Revenue dropped from 37,655 (Feb) to 22,216 (Mar) — 41% decline. Organic: South/Product_E Aug Revenue 20,000.

agent_plan: Preparing to hand off task for creating Word report. Planning to use python-docx and pandas. Will compute statistics and incorporate charts.

steps.latency_observed: approx 15 seconds — multiple terminal attempts probing environment before successful run
steps.output: 216 rows × 5 columns loaded. All columns validated. Month set as ordered Categorical.
key_facts_produced: environment_probing: multiple failed terminal attempts before success

tools_called: numpy sqrt/square/minimum for downside anomaly score
steps.output: Total revenue 8,330,077, units 33,157. North leads (2,951,623). Product_A leads (1,674,467). Top anomaly: South/Product_B Mar Revenue 22,216, Units 56, rev_z=-2.85, units_z=-3.00, anomaly_score=4.14. Prior month Feb: Revenue 37,655, Units 149. Second: South/Product_E Aug Revenue 20,000, rev_z=-2.81, anomaly_score=3.72.
key_facts_produced: anomaly_1: Mar | South | Product_B | Revenue 22,216 | Units 56 | rev_z=-2.85 | units_z=-3.00 | score=4.14 | prior_rev=37,655
anomaly_2: Aug | South | Product_E | Revenue 20,000 | Units 103 | rev_z=-2.81 | score=3.72 | prior_rev=34,929

steps.output: Results dict passed into Word builder. Anomaly details including series averages and prior month values preserved.
5-section Word document: Executive Summary, Business Performance Overview, Anomaly Analysis (with sub-sections per anomaly), Leadership Implications, Method Note.

Narrative names both anomalies explicitly. South/Product_B March: Revenue 22,216 vs 11-month average 41,510 (46.5% decline), Units 56 vs average 164 (65.8% decline), avg price rose to 396.71 (volume issue not price). South/Product_E August: Revenue 20,000 vs average 35,255 (43.3% decline), lowest price per unit 194.17 in full dataset.
key_facts_produced: exec_summary: Total revenue $8,330,077 on 33,157 units. North led at $2,951,623. Product_A top at $1,674,467. Two unusually weak records: South/Product_B March and South/Product_E August.
anomaly_1_narrative: Revenue $22,216 vs 11-month average $41,510 (46.5% decline). Units 56 vs average 164 (65.8% decline). Avg price $396.71 — problem is volume not price erosion.
anomaly_2_narrative: Revenue $20,000 vs 11-month average $35,255 (43.3% decline). Lowest price per unit in dataset at $194.17.
recommendation_1: Investigate South/Product_B March — stock-outs, promotion rollback, channel issue.
recommendation_2: Investigate South/Product_E August — validate pricing and assortment changes.

facts_present_in_word_output: anomaly_South_ProductB_Mar: PRESENT (exec summary + dedicated sub-section with 46.5% decline)
anomaly_South_ProductE_Aug: PRESENT (exec summary + dedicated sub-section with 43.3% decline)
series_avg_comparison: PRESENT (11-month averages used in narrative)

word_output_actual_text.executive_summary: Total revenue was $8,330,077 on 33,157 units sold. North led revenue with $2,951,623 (35.4%). Product_A was the top driver at $1,674,467. Two unusually weak records merit follow-up: South/Product_B March and South/Product_E August.
word_output_actual_text.anomaly_section: South/Product_B March: Revenue $22,216 vs 11-month average $41,510 (46.5% decline). Units 56 vs average 164 (65.8% decline). Avg price $396.71 — volume issue not price erosion. South/Product_E August: Revenue $20,000 vs average $35,255 (43.3% decline). Lowest price per unit in dataset at $194.17.
recommendations: Investigate South/Product_B March — stock-outs, promotion rollback, channel disruption.
Investigate South/Product_E August — validate pricing and assortment changes.
Use North and West as internal benchmarks.
Defend and scale Product_A and Product_B.
Add automated anomaly monitoring at Region×Product level.
